address: Diani Beach Road, Diani Beach, Kenya
hotelDescription:
This upscale resort set in gardens next to Diani Beach on the Indian Ocean is 4 km from the Diani Chale Marine National Reserve.
 Casual rooms offer free Wi-Fi and flat-screen TVs, plus safes, minibars, and tea and coffeemaking facilities. They also have terraces or balconies, most with ocean views. Upgraded rooms add whirlpool tubs, while suites have living areas (1 has a rooftop terrace). An upgraded suite features a bar, and includes butler service. Room service is offered 24/7.
 Breakfast and parking are complimentary. There are 8 restaurants and bars, plus an outdoor pool, a gym and a spa. Other amenities include a kids' club and a cinema.

title: Avatar Hotel Santa Clara, Tapestry Collection by Hilton
description: Chic hotel offering vibrant rooms with modular furniture, plus a pancake house & an outdoor pool.
address: 4200 Great America Pkwy, Santa Clara, CA 95054
hotelDescription:
Set 1.1 miles from Highway 101, this 4-story, geek-chic hotel in Silicon Valley is less than a mile from the Intel Museum, and 1.1 miles from the Santa Clara Convention Center.
 Colorful rooms feature hip, modular furnishings, and offer flat-screen TVs, work desks and minifridges, plus free Wi-Fi, Keurig coffeemakers and iPod docks. Upgraded rooms add sitting areas with pull-out sofas.
 Parking is free. Additional amenities include an on-site pancake house and an airy guest lounge with a bar, plus an outdoor heated pool, a hot tub and an exercise room. There's also a 24-hour business center and a conference room.

title: Munyonyo Commonwealth Resort
description: Colourful rooms, suites & cottages in a lakefront resort offering dining, plus a bar & spa.
hotelDescription:
Set on 90 acres of lush gardens overlooking Lake Victoria, this serene, upmarket resort is a 15 minutes’ walk from Munyonyo Martyrs’ Shrine and 13 km from the Independence Monument. Entebbe International Airport is 44 km away.
 Colourful rooms feature Wi-Fi, flat-screen TVs and minifridges, as well as in-room safes, and balconies with garden or lake views. Suites add kitchenettes and separate living areas. A thatched bi-level cottage sleeps up to 4 guests. In-room dining is available 24/7.
 Breakfast is available. Other amenities include 6 restaurants, a bar and outdoor pool, plus a spa and gym. There’s also meeting space for up to 15,000 people.

title: Speke resort
description: Relaxed accommodations in a polished resort offering restaurants, a spa & an outdoor pool.
hotelDescription:
On leafy grounds along Lake Victoria, this refined resort is 4 km from the white sands of KK Beach and 39 km from Entebbe International Airport.
 Relaxed rooms with terraces or balconies feature Wi-Fi, flat-screen TVs and minifridges, plus tea and coffeemaking facilities. Suites offer separate living and dining areas. The 2-bedroom thatched cottages add kitchenettes, hot tubs and private butler service.
 Dining options include an airy restaurant, a trendy bar and a casual terrace eatery. There’s also a spa, an outdoor pool and a gym, as well as squash. Breakfast, fishing, boat trips and airport shuttles are available.

updatesFromCustomers.text:
​"As a professional Personal Trainer with 9 years of experience in the fitness industry, I can say that Fitness Point (Gacuriro) is a top-notch facility in terms of equipment and setup. It is truly a well-equipped and beautiful space.
​However, the experience was deeply soured by the reception staff. The front desk team lacks the basic professionalism and 'customer-attraction' skills required for such a venue. Their attitude was cold, dry, and frankly, unprofessional. We were two people, and the lack of hospitality and poor body language was evident to both of us.
​In this industry, people pay premium prices not just for machines, but for a positive environment and satisfaction. A gym should be a place to release stress, not to gain negative energy due to a lack of professional ethics at the door. I don't believe the current staff is qualified or suitable to represent a high-end gym like this. I hope management takes this seriously and invests in staff training to match the quality of the facility

title: Hilton Garden Inn Budapest City Centre
description: Bright rooms in an unassuming hotel offering a restaurant & a rooftop terrace, plus Basilica views.
hotelDescription:
This informal hotel flanked by shops and restaurants is a 3-minute walk from both St. Stephen's Basilica and the Opera metro station, and 2 km from Buda Castle.
 Relaxed rooms feature free Wi-Fi, flat-screens and minifridges, as well as sitting areas, and tea and coffeemakers. Suites add living areas and terraces; some have Basilica views. Room service is offered.
 A breakfast buffet (surcharge) is served in an airy restaurant. There’s also a modern bar, a gym and a garden, plus a coin-operated laundry, a 24-hour convenience store, and a rooftop terrace that has Basilica views. Parking (fee) and electric charging stations are available.

 Modern studios feature Wi-Fi and flat-screen TVs, as well as kitchenettes. The 1-bedroom apartments provide separate living rooms with sofabeds.
 Amenities consist of a gym, a convenience store and a lounge. Breakfast and parking are available.

title: Village Hotel Southampton Eastleigh
description: Modern rooms in a relaxed hotel featuring a health club with a pool & a gym, plus a bar/restaurant.
address: Bournemouth Rd, Chandler's Ford, Eastleigh SO53 3YJ, United Kingdom
hotelDescription:
Set across the street from Hut Wood, this laid-back hotel is 3 miles from Eastleigh Lakeside Steam Railway, 4 miles from the M27 motorway and 8 miles from Marwell Zoo.
 Featuring colourful decor, the modern rooms have flat-screen TVs, Wi-Fi, and tea and coffeemaking facilities. Club rooms include access to a private lounge.
 Amenities consist of a relaxed bar/restaurant, and health club with a gym and an indoor pool. Breakfast and parking are available.

title: Holiday Inn Southampton-Eastleigh M3,Jct13 by IHG
description: Straightforward hotel with a restaurant & a lounge bar, plus a fitness centre and an indoor pool.
address: Leigh Rd, Eastleigh SO50 9PG, United Kingdom
hotelDescription:
Just off the M3 motorway, this straightforward hotel is 3 miles from Southampton Airport and 6 miles from Southampton railway station. It's 10 miles from Paultons Family Theme Park.
 Simple rooms feature free Wi-Fi, flat-screen TVs, and tea and coffeemaking facilities, as well as minibars. Upgraded quarters add work desks and chairs. Room service is offered 24/7. Kids age 18 and under stay at no charge with an adult.
 Parking is included. A hot breakfast buffet is available for a surcharge. Other amenities include a restaurant (kids age 12 and under eat free), an indoor heated pool and a fitness centre, plus a lounge bar with a Starbucks.

title: Best Western Chilworth Manor Hotel - managed by Legacy Hotels and Resorts
description: Down-to-earth hotel an Edwardian manor house, plus a restaurant, a spa, an indoor pool & a gym.
hotelDescription:
Set on 12 acres of landscaped grounds off the M27 motorway, this informal hotel in an Edwardian manor house is 5 miles from both the Mayflower Theatre and the SeaCity Museum.
 The classically furnished rooms come with free Wi-Fi, flat-screen TVs, and tea and coffeemaking facilities. Some rooms have sofabeds.
 Parking is complimentary. Amenities include a restaurant and a cocktail bar. There's an indoor pool and a hot tub, as well as a fitness room and a spa. Meeting space is available.

title: Holiday Inn Milton Keynes
description: Informal rooms in a casual lodging offering free Wi-Fi, a restaurant, and a health club with a pool.
address: 500 Saxon Gate, West, Milton Keynes MK9 2HQ, United Kingdom
hotelDescription:
This contemporary hotel is 0.6 miles from the Xscape entertainment centre, 0.9 miles from Milton Keynes Theatre, and 1 mile from Milton Keynes Central railway station.
 Informal, modern rooms feature free Wi-Fi and flat-screen TVs with satellite channels, plus desks, and tea and coffeemaking facilities. Room service is available 24/7.
 A casual restaurant/bar serves classic cuisine, including a breakfast buffet (fee). There's also a health club offering an indoor pool, a sauna, a steam room and a gym, plus beauty/massage treatments. Other amenities include 9 meeting rooms and parking (fee). Kids 12 and under stay and eat free with paying adults.

title: Kigali Marriott Hotel
description: Elegant rooms & suites in a posh hotel offering a gym, dining & a spa with Ayurvedic treatments.
hotelDescription:
A 15-minute walk from the shops of Kigali City Tower, this upscale city centre hotel is 3 km from the Ethnographic Museum.
 Featuring floor-to-ceiling windows, and balconies with city or garden views, the elegant rooms offer free Wi-Fi and flat-screen TVs, plus desks, safes and minifridges. Plush suites add living rooms; some provide dining rooms and panoramic city views. There's 24-hour room service.
 Parking and fitness classes are free. There's a refined Italian restaurant with terrace seating, and a sleek lobby bar. A spa offers massages and Ayurvedic treatments. There's also an outdoor pool and a gym. Breakfast is available for a surcharge.
